finalists.name: Cat Water Fountain Stainless Steel, 3.2L Automatic Quiet Drinking Fountain With 2 Filters 2 Sponges Water Level Window Gifts For Kitty Small Pets Indoor
finalists.descExcerpt: 2 RUNNING WATER FLOW MODES: The flower-shaped cat water fountain features 5 gentle water streams that naturally attract pets to drink more often. With adjustable flow settings, you can easily remove the fountain spout to match your pet's preference CLEANER FRESHER WATER: Equipped with a 4-layer filtration system made of silver coconut shell and activated carbon, this cat fountain effectively removes hair, impurities, and odors. It includes 2 replacement filters and 2 filter sponges with a recommended replacement schedule of every 2-3 weeks. The built-in sponge inside the pump captures debris and extends the pump's lifespan SAFE EASY TO CLEAN: Our water fountain for cats is made from robust SUS 304 stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting use and resistance to rust. The smooth metal surface is dishwasher safe, easy to clean and convenient for busy pet owners EASY WATER MONITORING: The built-in transparent LED water level window allows you to check the water level easily, even in low light. The illuminated view helps you see at a glance when it is time to refill FOR DAILY USE: With a 3.2L water tank, this cat water fountain provides enough fresh water for 7-12 days. It is ideal for households with 1 kitty or 2 small pets, minimizing refill frequency while fitting in your apartment including indoor spaces like bedrooms Product dimensions: 21.1 x 12 x 8.0 cm Product material: ABS + 304 stainless steel Power supply: 5V/1A Capacity: 3.2L Noise level: < 25dB List of Accessories 1. USB charging cable * 1 2. Filter element * 2 3. Water pump filter cotton * 2 4. Cleaning brush * 1 5. Instruction manual * 1

finalists.name: At Water Fountain Stainless Steel, 108oz 3.2L Cat Fountain, Pet Water Fountain With Water Level Window, Hemispherical Shape, Multi-Filter, Silent Pump, Water Tap, Provides Flowing Water
finalists.descExcerpt: 【Why Choose a Flowing Water Source?】 Cats prefer flowing water. Cats are less interested in static water sources. The shape of the faucet satisfies a cat's curiosity and exploratory nature. In addition, the circulation of water can keep it clean for a long time. Use AONBOY's cat water fountain to give your pet access to flowing water, and they will enjoy drinking it. 【"Big Eyes", Water Level Display】 You can check the amount of water remaining in the cat fountain at any time through the display window. There is no need to tediously open the lid of the cat fountain. This can't be done on ordinary stainless steel cat fountain. It can save your time. 【SUS304, Healthy Food Grade Material】 Pet water fountain is made of high quality stainless steel imported from Germany. It is resistant to high temperature, corrosion and oxidation, fully reflecting the quality and safety. Compared with plastic materials, pet water fountain can effectively prevent black chin in cats. (Note: the water level window is not stainless steel and cannot be used in the sterilizer) 【108oz/3.2L Capacity, 8 Days of Drinking Water】 Dog water fountain capacity is 3.2L, which can meet the drinking water of an adult cat for about 8 days. If you have a short trip, your pet can also drink fresh domestic water every day. Dog water fountain helps you to save the tedious steps, add water once and enjoy a comfortable life. Note: Please be aware that this model only has a USB interface and does not come with a power plug.

finalists.name: 4-in-1 Powerful Cordless Car Vacuum Cleaner, 16000PA Handheld Mini Vacuum Cordless With Brushless Motor, 3 Adjustable Levels, Battery Indicator
finalists.descExcerpt: [Test Winner]: The powerful handheld vacuum cleaner features a powerful built-in brushless motor and an innovative straight air duct design, which can reduce air resistance by 80% and has a suction power of up to 16000PA. 3 levels are adjustable: press and hold for 2 seconds to turn on, press briefly to change the suction level. Compared to other handheld cordless mini vacuums, it has greater suction power. [4-in-1 Multifunctional]: The powerful cordless table vacuum cleaner is equipped with 7 different nozzles and has 4 modes: vacuum mode, blowing mode, air pump mode and vacuum extraction mode, easily meeting various daily needs. Its versatile and lightweight design makes it your best choice for cleaning. [Wide Application]: Cordless handheld vacuum - Easily removes dust, hair and dirt. (carpet, sofa, drawer, car, table). Car blower - removes dust and dead leaves. (Keyboard, PC, dusting corners). Supports outdoor charcoal fires, say goodbye to compressed air sprays. Air pump - used to inflate mattresses, floats, balloons and other objects. Vacuum extraction - for vacuum storage bags. [Improved Large Capacity Battery]: The cordless car vacuum cleaner is equipped with a large capacity 6000 mAh battery, which can run continuously for 30-40 minutes after being fully charged. Full charge only takes 4-5 hours and can be charged using car chargers, power banks, etc. If the battery power is too low, the suction power will also be reduced. (red light when charging, green when full).Hair dryer - silver-purple brushless motor + one-click dust container * 3 cells * 2000mAh * can be paired with 16-country manual *1

lampCandidates.name: Wireless Trailer Light Board, Magnetic Trailer Rear Lighting Kit Wifi Led 12V 24V, LED Trailer Lights Waterproof
lampCandidates.descExcerpt: General description: The wireless trailer light board is a magnetic rear lighting kit equipped with rechargeable LED lights. Designed for use on trailers, this lighting solution is both practical and efficient, offering optimal visibility thanks to its waterproof design and wireless technology. Technical specifications: Product size: 105x105x64 mm Lens: Unbreakable PC Housing: ABS Charging voltage: DC 5V Operating frequency: 2.4G Radio reception range: 20 meters Protection rating: IP65 waterproof Charging time: 3 hours Operating time: 10 hours Use: Each light features a strong magnetic base with an anti-scratch rubber suction cup on the back, allowing secure attachment to your vehicles. To use it, simply turn on the switches on the light and plug the 7-pin connector with the transmitter into the vehicle socket, and the system will be ready for use. Other information: Packaged in a cabin box, this kit is easy to store.Car light - European standard *1
